My favourite horror game is actually poppy playtime I love the grabpack and I also love gorilla tag so this is definitely My style it's not buggy and the servers work great and the puzzles are REALLY unique I'm exited for chapter 2,3,4 and however many chapters this game ends up having

To start off the player, my girls are epic! One of my friends the developer "nox". The first chapter was just amazing and terrifying! The only thing I had the problem with is the ending scene? It was kind of short but it was all right!

The game hardly works I couldn't even get past the part where you put the four different colored cores into the thing and I couldn't swap hands even though I did the correct stuff to do and it was and it just didn't work and I don't like it and if you guys need to please fix it so I can like it

The game is pretty fun. I enjoyed playing it with my other 2 friends. A couple of problems here and there being the menu was very buggy, and your cursor or pointer would be set further up and left than what was actually shown on the game. The purple hand was funny to use but was janky to select as you would have to point your stick somewhere else to pick it. Picking up the smaller things with grip and then the bigger ones with the grab pack was a little confusing as we couldn't immediately figure it out, trying to grab it with the pack and it wouldn't let us until one of us grabbed it. In the vents, when you activate the door and open it, you don't get a notification or anything that lets you know that it had been opened. The picking up teddy bears and throwing them in the tubes was really long and annoying. If the total was only 10, it would be much better. When you put them all in and run in the vent, you crash when you jump down the last area, so we assume that's where the game ends. Other than those problems, the game was good.

I am a g tag player and waited so long for the game and the wait was worth it!😁i also LOVE poppy playtime and you made a game with lore g tag movement and is poppy play time. The best fan game I have played jet. Really looking forward to chapter 2 of plushtime👍
If you like popy playtime you will love this game high graphics Good animations and awesome Game play

kinda disapointed, waited quite a while and its pretty short and also repetetive, it just felt like "ok get 2 batteries, ok now get 4, ok now run through a maze and then get 20 bears and organize them", was kinda boring tbh but for a first chapter its ok, couldve used with maybe a few extra months for more content
also i think it would be neat if the grabpack arms moved where your arms went, like they were connected to your lower arms or upper arms

(reply to devs response :  I wouldnt really mind if the release was delayed, im sure many others wouldnt mind either, if the few months benefit the game in some way, like fixing bugs and adding more good content, then Im sure noone would mind. Also just to be clear I didnt hate this game, it just wasnt what I was expecting. Im sure chapter 2 will be amazing, and im excited to see what you guys come up with!)

Definitely recommend, it was super chaotic but fun, the game isnt too hard but is not too easy,  me and some friends were screaming while we were getting chased by teddy we were also running for our lives because we didn’t know where the exit was we were so tired at the end and we screamed in happiness 10/10 games definitely recommend this game such a good horror game on vr also free.
